reviews.title: 2 star hotel disguising as 4 star
reviews.text:
Extremely run down hotel, definitely not what you would expect from a 4 star hotel.

1. Upon check in, toilet was not even flushed and it leave a terrible pee odour that lingered throughout our 3d2n stay
2. Long wait for the lifts
3. Dilapidated condition: peeling wallpaper, broken sun chairs, bath towels are so worn out it had huge holes, toilet extremely mouldy (I don’t even know how can a shower hose have so much mould on it)
4. Thin walls, you can hear everything next door and on top of you, literally a 360 degree surround sound system
5. Housekeeping has really strict rules, only 2 towels per room and they don’t even provide swimming towels which is weird considering it is a pool resort

For the price they are charging, there are much better hotels out there. What a pity given their extremely prime location. I would stay somewhere further and grab to KSL insteadl. 100/10 will not recommend!

reviews.title: Lovely room but lack of facilties
reviews.text:
We had a pleasant stay at this hotel which is brand new. The room was very confortable but there were no facilties like swimming pool or gym because there were still under construction. We did not enjoy the breakfast, it was definitely below standards for a 5 stars hotel. 
However, the location was very convenient and there is a mall right next to the hotel which was a plus for us. 

Overall, it was a pretty good value for money due to the important discount we got from Agoda.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Bad location

reviews.title: Very Dangerous Gym
reviews.text: I stayed in KSL on 20 Jan 2026. In the gym on the 7th floor, the machine had a under maintenance notice on it. I came back again on 20 May 2026 after 4 months, the machine is still under maintenance. Horrible!!! Why will the machine in the gym be repaired? The other free weights dumbells are very loose too. It is very dangerous for the guests to use. Totally disappointed.

reviews.title: Very Dangerous Gym

reviews.title: Not comfortable
reviews.text: During check in after 7pm asked for late check out which I’m not asking for free however was informed with unfriendly tone suite not available for late check out which I cannot understand what business are they running. At 1am having issues with Netflix log in as the previous guest locked the app and I couldn’t understand the TV language settings. What a night I have to call multiple time even we had to approach the reception for help. Definitely not returning again after spending RM600 for the suite.

reviews.title: STAY AT YOUR OWN RISK, Dirty Noisy, Haunted
reviews.text: I will not even give it a 1-star as this is the worst hotel i have ever stayed in my life. The furnishings are so old, when you enter the room, you can smell a stale mouldy wooden smell of old furniture. We requested for a change of room at 4am as there some noise coming from outside. Called the reception so many times, the staff were not helpful and even cut my line when i called a few times when the techician is not here to check. waited half an hour for the maintenence guy to show up. He heard the noise and only then they let us changed the room. Both rooms we stayed are super eerie. For the first room, at tower 1, it is at level 8 facing the exit staircase, the toilet flush pipe can be heard at random timing, this happened twice and each time it lasted like almost 5-10 mins with the flushing sound. For the second room that we stayed at tower 2, level 10, it is facing the exit staircase, the room is definitely haunted.  The slidng door to the cabinet was closed and when we woke up the next day it was opened, both me and my friend did not use the cupboard at all.  You just feel uneasy as though someone is watching you. You can google for some haunting sightings at agoda review, just sort the rating from lowest onwards. There are some reviews on facebook as well  for spooky experience there. Be warned and booked at your own risk.

reviews.title: Lock not working properly
reviews.text: My lock got issue. You don’t need key to unlock the door, just need to push in. It says bathrobe provided but end up no bathrobe… says dinosaur theme park free for guests. End up still need to pay… it’s a scam… very disappointed

reviews.title: Lifts are worn down
reviews.text: We were stuck in the lift for nearly 30 min. They took their time to rescue us. What a bad experience! Asked for refund but they wanted to give us free stay but when we agreed, nobody replied to the email anymore even after repeated emails to them.

reviews.title: cheated by the picture of children pool
reviews.text: got cheated, dont believe in the photo, most of the pool are old and still want charge RM 20 per entry!, we pay for hotel service but got  apartment stay. will not visit ksl resort anymore

reviews.title: DO NOT STAY! BAD!
reviews.text:
This is a bad experience. We have always been staying at KSL residence but from different host, as we are a big family of 9. 
Hence I came by this unit with 4BR host by KSL Hotel. 
To my horror, after check in, the private lift wasn't working and we have to take the shared lift and every wait take 15mins! This is just part 1.
When we enter the unit, we realised it is a different unit. We wanted a 4BR but was given 3BR. 
We went to the reception and was inform that we were given an UPGRADE to 3BR PENTHOUSE. Which part looks like an upgrade? We wanted a 4BR, NOT A USELESS 3BR PENTHOUSE. why is it useless? The patio was locked?!?! Hence it was useless. So do we need to be happy???? 

I felt it is a DOWNGRADE. It was late night already, folks and kids are all tired. Hence we just make do with it. 

After we checkout, I wrote in to KSL and agoda to raise my unhappiness.  coward KSL didnt dare to reply, pushing the responsibility from one to another. End up I insisted Agoda to be responsible since they are the middleman. If im dont rmb wrongly, I was given pathetic US$30 or less as compensation 
 
DO NOT STAY HERE

reviews.title: Do not go Apartment
reviews.text:
Its haunted! 
Stayed at apartment as no hotel room.  Has bed bugs on sofa , dining chairs and beds. 
Ants over the kitchen. Ventilation is bad.
After 10pm door to mall closed and will be very very inconvenient.
Never take the apartment, my friends said haunted which I dont believe but its REAL. 
Sad and disappointed. WA of the hotel not respinsive at all.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
Upon checked in to the room, the refrigerator is not working.  We made a complaint and the staff came and told us that they need to replace another one. We waited for 2 hours in the room and nobody showed up. We went to the front desk to make a complaint on this issue again. Finally,  the replaced a working refrigerator. 

On the 2nd night,  around 12pm midnight,  we went to the toilet and noticed there was a pool of water near the toilet bowl. We thought it was not a big problem,  do we went back to sleep. Next morning,  when we used the toilet,  the leaking was worse.  The whole area in the bathroom/ toilet was full of water. 
During out checked at the front desk, we complaint both matters to the hotel manager. The manager told us that we did not book the room directly with them so they can't do anything for us. We have to complaint with agoda.  We are not happy for the room that we paid for. Please resolve this matter  and keep us updated. Thank you!

reviews.room_type: 3-Bedroom Executive Apartment with Private Pool B

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: The hotel is directly connected to KSL Mall, making it extremely convenient for guests. The mall offers a wide variety of services, including massage, nail care, and hair salons. There is also a supermarket located within the mall, although it can get quite crowded with long queues. In addition, there are many restaurants nearby, giving guests plenty of dining options.

reviews.title: Poor service
reviews.text:
In all my years staying at hotels locally and overseas, this is the first time a request for an extra towel has been refused.

While staff cited hotel policy, great hotels are defined by employees who use judgment and make customer-focused decisions rather than simply relying on rules.

A single interaction can shape a guest’s perception of the entire hotel, and small staff decisions can have a significant impact on the overall guest experience.

In addition, the fridge wasn’t turned on and smell bad. The hair dryer became too hot and cannot be used after a single short use.
